use_cases: Text input fields in forms requiring multi-line user input
Comment sections and message input areas
Description fields for content creation interfaces
Feedback forms with text-heavy user responses
Contact forms and support ticket creation
ai_summary: A versatile textarea component with multiple size variants (default, sm, lg, xl, fixed) and visual variants (default, destructive, ghost). Features built-in clearable functionality with an X button, custom scrollbar styling, and proper accessibility with focus states. Uses class-variance-authority for variant management and React hooks for state management.
